Definition: To give permission, power, or the legal right to do something.
To beget (of a man); to bear or conceive (of a woman).
Of or relating to knowledge or cognition; cognitive.
To nurture or bring up offspring, or to provide similar parental care to an unrelated child.
The characteristic of being humble; humbleness in character and behavior.
A thing that is not dispensable; a necessity.
To apply a nuance to; to change or redefine in a subtle way.
To declare formally, officially or ceremoniously.
Example: I hereby pronounce you man and wife.
He always concentrates on the superficials and fails to see the real issue.

Definition: To combine two or more things to produce a new product.
Never before seen, done, or experienced; without precedent.
